title: brief-capabilities.json — authoritative catalog of brief §11/§12 capabilities
description: Emitted by /analyze alongside requirements.md. Every capability the brief promises has an entry here; PM consumes this list to produce tasks-coverage.json. Authoritative spec: plans/active/feat-023-pm-stage-brief-coverage-assertion.md. Zod mirror: packages/orchestrator-contracts/src/brief-coverage.ts.

id.description: cap-{section}-{kebab-slug}; section may be a decimal like 11.4.

source.description: Citation back to brief.md, e.g. 'brief.md#12' or 'brief.md#11.4'.
